name: TA Oakley (TravelCenters of America)
description: Full-service TravelCenters of America truck stop at I-70/US-40 with Phillips 66 diesel, an on-site IHOP, showers, laundry, and roughly 84 truck parking spaces.

name: CAT Scale at TA Oakley
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the I-70/US-40 travel center in Oakley for weighing loaded semis.

name: JJ Travel Stop (J-J Oil Co)
description: Independent truck stop at the I-70/US-83 exit in Oakley offering diesel, a deli, showers, and repair service.

name: Mitten Truck Repair Service
description: Locally-operated 24-hour truck repair and truck-wash operation at the Oakley I-70/US-40 travel center with roadside service trucks.

name: Pilot Travel Center #920
description: Major Pilot travel center at I-70 Exit 54 in Colby with diesel lanes, showers, laundry, a quick-service restaurant, and an on-site CAT Scale.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center Colby
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Pilot travel center off I-70 Exit 54 in Colby.

name: 24/7 Travel Store - Goodland
description: 24-hour travel store at I-70 Exit 17 (Hwy 27) in Goodland with diesel lanes, certified scales, showers, laundry, and Qdoba/Chester's food, plus about 50 paved truck spaces.

name: Kanorado Weigh Station (KHP Scale 46)
description: Kansas Highway Patrol commercial-vehicle weigh station on I-70 eastbound near the Colorado state line at Kanorado, open weekdays.

name: Petro Stopping Center Salina
description: Full-service Petro truck stop off I-70 Exit 252 with an Iron Skillet restaurant, a CAT scale, showers, and 24-hour diesel.

name: Flying J Travel Center #659
description: Pilot Flying J travel center at I-70 Exit 253 offering diesel lanes, a CAT scale, showers, laundry, and a drivers lounge.

name: Pilot Travel Center #903
description: Pilot travel center at I-70 Exit 252 with diesel and gas fuel, showers, restrooms, food, and semi-truck parking.

name: 24/7 Travel Store Russell
description: Independent 24/7 travel store at I-70 Exit 184 (US-281) with fuel, a restaurant, tire and mechanic service, and truck parking.

name: Golden Ox Truck Stop
description: Independent Hays truck stop at I-70 Exit 159 (US-183) with 24-hour diesel, a convenience store, deli and Subway, and truck parking.

name: 24/7 Travel Store Hays
description: 24/7 travel store near I-70 Exit 159 in Hays with fuel, a store, drivers lounge, restrooms, and free Wi-Fi.

name: Love's Travel Stop #455
description: Love's travel stop at I-70 Exit 145 in Ellis with 24-hour diesel, showers, laundry, Subway and Dairy Queen, and truck parking.

name: 24/7 Travel Store WaKeeney
description: 24/7 travel plaza at I-70 Exit 127 (US-283) in WaKeeney with fuel, food, showers, laundry, and truck parking.
